params.toIndex: number (0-based insertion index in target list's cards array)

moveCard.returns: boolean — true on success, false if any id is invalid. No-ops if fromListId === toListId.

reorderCard.returns: boolean — true on success, false if card or list not found.

getState.returns: BoardState — used by dnd to validate ids before invoking mutations if needed.

notes: dnd computes toIndex from drop coordinates and the order of card DOM siblings, then invokes the appropriate mutation. dnd never mutates state directly. moveCard with fromListId === toListId should not be used; dnd must call reorderCard for same-list moves.
